subject: Product Management
title: Segmenting for Fit
description: A fast breakdown of Segmenting for Fit for builders.

hook.text: You might have PMF already — just not with the segment you're targeting. Segmentation reveals hidden fit.

buildup.text: Segment users by behavior, not demographics. Power users, occasional users, and churned users each tell a different story.

discovery.text: When Superhuman segmented by the 40% test, they found strong fit with certain user types and none with others.

twist.text: Instead of trying to please everyone, they doubled down on the segment with the strongest fit and ignored the rest.

climax.text: Segmenting first and then building for your best segment is more effective than averaging across all users.

punchline.text: Find who loves you. Build for them. Ignore the rest.

quiz.question: How does segmentation help with product-market fit?
options: It reveals which user types have the strongest fit so you can focus on them
It helps you target the largest possible market
